arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ دَاوُدَ الْمَهْرِيُّ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ، أَخْبَرَنِي جَابِرُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، عَنْ عُقَيْلٍ، بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ بِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ وَيُؤَخِّرُ الْمَغْرِبَ حَتَّى يَجْمَعَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ الْعِشَاءِ حِينَ يَغِيبُ الشَّفَقُ ‏.‏

english.narrator: The above mentioned tradition has also been reported by 'Uqail through a different chain of narrators. He said:
english.text: He would delay the evening prayer till he combined the evening and the night prayers when the twilight disappeared.

arabic.title: سنن أبي داود
arabic.author: الإمام سليمان بن الأشعث أبو داود السجستاني

english.title: Sunan Abi Dawud
english.author: Imam Sulayman ibn al-Ash'ath Abu Dawud al-Sijistani

chapter.english: Prayer (Kitab Al-Salat): Detailed Rules of Law about the Prayer during Journey
